class.name: grid_planners/AStarPlanner
class.description: A* global path planner (octile heuristic, 8-connected grid)

class.name: grid_planners/DijkstraPlanner
class.description: Dijkstra global path planner (zero heuristic, 8-connected grid)

class.name: grid_planners/GBFSPlanner
class.description: Greedy Best-First Search planner (heuristic only, 8-connected grid)
